category: Ecommerce storefront and shopping cart platform
api_surface: REST API covering products, orders, customers, carts, store profile, discounts, and application lifecycle

api_surface: REST APIs across listings, orders, reports, feeds, catalog, inventory, finances, and seller operations
blocker: Requires Amazon developer registration, seller/vendor context, app review, and restricted data approval for many useful scopes
notes: Technically buildable, but not a quick self-serve integration for a generic agent toolkit because production credentials and scopes are gated.
